zh.lifeSummary: 當Simon de Raleigh於1223年出生在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆時，他的父親Warin de Raleigh33歲，母親Mrs Warin de Raleigh54歲。他於1240年與Joan le Tort在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1287年在他的家鄉享年64歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Simon de Raleigh于1223年出生在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆时，他的父亲Warin de Raleigh33岁，母亲Mrs Warin de Raleigh54岁。他于1240年与Joan le Tort在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1287年在他的家乡享年64岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Raleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Raleigh (House) in Pilton (Devon), recorded as Radeleia in 1086 and Rawlegh in 1535. The placename probably derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe deer’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The English explorer Sir Walter Raleigh (1554–1618) was born in Hayes Barton, Devon, into a family of Devon gentry. He was related to most of the West Country's important families, including that of Sir Francis Drake. His half-brother was the explorer Sir Humphrey Gilbert. In 1578 Raleigh was granted a patent to explore and colonize “unknown lands” in America. In the 1580s he was granted extensive estates in Munster (Ireland), in reward for his suppression of the Desmond Rebellions.

variants.name: Rawleigh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Orlo.
English: variant of   Raleigh  , reflecting a common pronunciation.

variants.name: Riley
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name chiefly from High Ryley in Accrington (Lancashire) and Riley in Kirkburton, which was in the manor of Wakefield (Yorkshire). In some cases the name may derive from Riley Farm in Eyam (Derbyshire), Royley in Royton (Lancashire), or Rylah in Scarcliffe (Derbyshire). The placenames all come from Old English rȳge ‘rye’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

Irish: from Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach. This is the name of a chieftain family in Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly or Rahilly . See O'Reilly .

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Simon de Raleigh was born in 1223, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, his father, Warin de Raleigh, was 33 and his mother, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, was 54. He married Joan le Tort in 1240, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died in 1287, in his hometown, at the age of 64, and was buried in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Simon de Raleigh est né en 1223, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Warin de Raleigh, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Joan le Tort en 1240, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé en 1287, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Simon de Raleigh 1223 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Warin de Raleigh 33 und seine Mutter Mrs Warin de Raleigh 54. Er hat 1240 in Somerset, England Joan le Tort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne. Er starb 1287 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Raleigh è nato il nel 1223 nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Warin de Raleigh, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, aveva 54 anni. Lui sposato Joan le Tort nel 1240, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. Morì nel 1287, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Nettlecombe, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Simon de Raleighが1223年にイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベで生まれた時，父Warin de Raleighは33歳，母Mrs Warin de Raleighは54歳であった。1240年にイギリスソメルセトでJoan le Tortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1287年に故郷で64歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトネットレコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Simon de Raleigh(이)가 1223년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Warin de Raleigh(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Warin de Raleigh(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1240년 영국 서머세트에서 Joan le Tort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1287년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Simon de Raleigh nasceu em 1223, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Warin de Raleigh, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan le Tort em 1240, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1287, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Simon de Raleigh родился в 1223 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Warin de Raleigh было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs Warin de Raleigh, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan le Tort в 1240 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер в 1287 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Simon de Raleigh nació en 1223, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Warin de Raleigh, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mrs Warin de Raleigh, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Joan le Tort en 1240, en Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió en 1287, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra.
